# Original LEZAC.EXE level-1 player/bomb timing evidence, captured
# in-container via DOSBox /proc/mem tick-locked sampling (frame counter
# DS:0x78C2 polled; one read per tick; player anchor DS:0xC21E/0xC220;
# bomb actor countdown at record offset 0x1B in the DS:0x74A8 table).
# The main-loop governor (file 0x8089) holds 30 frames in 120..125
# hundredths of a second; the converged rate oscillates 24.2..25.2 fps
# (delay word DS:0x78CC dithering 96<->102 ms with step DS:0x78CA=6).
# Jump is 8.8 fixed-point: v0=-848, gravity +64 per tick, floor-to-pixel;
# the per-tick y deltas below reproduce that model exactly.
route_timing_original=level1
source=LEZAC.EXE via DOSBox /proc/mem tick-locked read
runtime_ds=0c8f
frame_counter_offset=0x78c2
governor_file_offset=0x8089
governor_window_frames=30
governor_target_hundredths_min=120
governor_target_hundredths_max=125
governed_fps_min=24.2
governed_fps_max=25.2
walk_px_per_tick=4
walk_px_per_second=98
jump_v0_fixed=-848
jump_gravity_fixed=64
jump_fixed_shift=8
jump_peak_px=24
jump_rise_ticks=12
jump_tick_dy=-4,-3,-3,-2,-3,-2,-1,-2,-1,-1,-1,-1
small_bomb_fuse_ticks=41
small_bomb_fuse_place_tick=396
small_bomb_fuse_zero_tick=437
explosion_playback_ticks=55
visual_claim=0
temp_copy=1
